---
name: Skill language improvement
about: Something reads as too technical, confusing, or unclear
labels: language, good first issue
---

**Which skill?**
(e.g. `/ds:context`, `/ds:look`)

**What part is unclear?**
(Quote the exact text that confused you)

**Who would be confused by it?**
(e.g. "someone who has never used Terminal", "someone who doesn't know what a git repo is")

**Suggested rewrite (optional):**
(What would be clearer? Plain English is the goal — no jargon.)

---
Note: Language improvements are the highest-leverage contribution in this repo.
Our users have zero engineering background. If something reads like a dev doc, it needs to be rewritten.
